mapper.select: SELECT SUM (T2.TON) as ZQ_QUANTITY FROM T_YARD_TALLY T1, T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM T2, T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST T3, M_WORK_PROCESS T5 WHERE T1. ID = T2.TALLY_ID AND T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = T3.SHIPVOYAGE_ID AND T2.CARGO_INFO_ID = T3.CARGO_INFO_ID AND T1.PROCESS_CODE = T5.PROCESS_CD AND T1.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND T5.TALLY_DATA_STAT = '20' AND T5.ZQ_TALLY_STATISTIC = #{zqTallyStatistic} AND T3.ID = #{handoverlistId}

SELECT SUM (YTI.TON) as ZQ_QUANTITY FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST BH, (SELECT BTC.TRUST_ID,BT.SHIPVOYAGE_ID,BT.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID,BTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST BT INNER JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO BTC ON BT.ID = BTC.TRUST_ID) BTTC, T_PRD_WORK_PLAN PWP, T_YARD_TALLY YT, T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM YTI, M_WORK_PROCESS WP WHERE BH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = BTTC.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID AND BH.CARGO_INFO_ID = BTTC.CARGO_INFO_ID AND YT.PLAN_ID = PWP.ID AND YT. ID = YTI.TALLY_ID AND PWP.TRUST_ID = BTTC.TRUST_ID AND YTI.CARGO_INFO_ID = BTTC.CARGO_INFO_ID AND YT.PROCESS_CODE = WP.PROCESS_CD AND YT.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND WP.TALLY_DATA_STAT = '20' AND WP.ZQ_TALLY_STATISTIC = #{zqTallyStatistic} AND BH.ID = #{handoverlistId}

SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(T.SCN,'集港',t.WEIGHT_GOODS,'拆箱集港',t.WEIGHT_GOODS,'疏港',t.WEIGHT_GOODS,0)),0) AS FLX_WEIGH, NVL(SUM(DECODE(T.SCN,'陆销',t.WEIGHT_GOODS,0)),0) AS LX_WEIGH FROM ( SELECT BH.ID,TO_CHAR(TBT.TYPE) AS SCN,V.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO V INNER JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO BTC ON V.PLAN_NO = BTC.BUSINESS_NO INNER JOIN T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST BH ON BTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = BH.CARGO_INFO_ID INNER JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBT.ID = BTC.TRUST_ID WHERE V.IS_OLD = '否' UNION ALL SELECT BH.ID,TO_CHAR(V.PLAN_TYPE),V.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO V INNER JOIN T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST BH ON V.CARGO_INFO_ID = BH.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE V.IS_OLD = '是' ) T WHERE T.ID = #{handoverlistId}

SELECT TCS.ID, TCS.COMPANY_ID, TCS.COMPANY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TCS.CUSTOMER_ID, TCS.CUSTOMER_NAME, TCS.TYPE, TCS.TRUST_ID, TCS.TRUST_CARGO_ID, TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCS.CARGO_CODE, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TCS.TRADE_TYPE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_DATE, TCS.STATUS, MDD_STATEMENT_STATUS.DICT_LABEL STATUS_LABEL, TCS.REMARK, TCS.CREATE_BY, TCS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME, TCS.UPDATE_BY, TCS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCS.UPDATE_TIME, TCS.IS_FINAL, (SELECT SUM(TCSD."NUMBER") FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD WHERE TCSD.STATEMENT = TCS.ID ) "NUMBER", DECODE(TCS.IS_FINAL, '0', '否','1', '是') IS_FINAL_LABEL, TCS.BONDED_AREA_TON FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCS JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_STATEMENT_STATUS ON (MDD_STATEMENT_STATUS.DICT_TYPE = 'STATEMENT_STATUS' AND TCS.STATUS = MDD_STATEMENT_STATUS.DICT_VALUE) WHERE (TCS.TYPE = '10' OR TCS.TYPE = '20') AND TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID = #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND TCS.IS_FINAL = #{isFinal,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TCSD.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SUM(TCSD."NUMBER") "NUMBER" FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCS JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT WHERE TCS.IS_FINAL = '0' AND TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID = #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TCSD.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID

SELECT ID, SERVICE_NM FROM T_BUS_SERVICE
AND SERVICE_NM NOT LIKE '%陆集陆疏%'
AND SERVICE_NM LIKE '%陆集陆疏%'
AND 1 = 2
AND IN_OUT = #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, VOYAGE FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT BH.ID, BH.TYPE, BH.CARGO_INFO_ID, BH.TRUST_ID, BH.TRUST_CARGO_ID, BH.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, BH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, BH.SHIP_NAME, BH.TRADE_TYPE, BH.LOAD_UNLOAD, BH.CARGO_OWNER_ID, BH.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, BH.CARGO_AGENT_ID, BH.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, BH.CARGO_CODE, BH.CARGO_NAME, BH.QUANTITY, BH.TON, BH.TICKET_NUM, BH.STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, BH.STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, BH.REMARK, BH.CREATE_BY, BH.CREATE_BY_NAME, BH.CREATE_TIME, BH.UPDATE_BY, BH.UPDATE_BY_NAME, BH.UPDATE_TIME, BH.VOYAGE, TDSI.IMP_EXP FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST BH LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON BH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE BH.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TCSD.ID, TCSD.STATEMENT, TCSD.CONTRACT_ID, TCSD.RATE_ID, TCSD.RATE_ITEM_CODE, TCSD.RATE_ITEM_NAME, TCSD.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, TCSD.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, TCSD.PROCESS_CODE, TCSD.PROCESS_NAME, TCSD.RATE, TCSD.UNIT_CODE, TCSD.UNIT_NAME, TCSD."NUMBER", TCSD.AMOUNT, TCSD.TAX, TCSD.TAX_AMOUNT, TCSD.REMARK, TCSD.CREATE_BY, TCSD.CREATE_BY_NAME, TCSD.CREATE_TIME, TCSD.UPDATE_BY, TCSD.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCSD.UPDATE_TIME FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCSD.STATEMENT = TCS.ID WHERE TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID = #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_FINAL, BONDED_AREA_TON) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, (select cargo_name from m_cargo where cargo_code = #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isFinal, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{bondedAreaTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL})

INSERT ALL
INTO T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL(ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.statement, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.serviceContentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.number, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_FINAL, CASE IS_FINAL WHEN '0' THEN '否' ELSE '是' END IS_FINAL_LABEL, BONDED_AREA_TON FROM T_COST_STATEMENT WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL WHERE STATEMENT = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME ASC
SELECT TBT.ID,TBT.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE,TBT.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME FROM T_BUS_TRUST TBT INNER JOIN T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH ON TBT.ID = TBH.TRUST_ID WHERE TBH.ID = #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT NVL(SUM(TON),0) AS BONDED_AREA_TON FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD INNER JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD MSY ON TPPSD.MASS_ID = MSY.ID WHERE TPPSD.INOUT_TYPE = '2' AND MSY.IS_BONDED_AREA = '1' AND TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select DISTINCT TDSD.BERTH_NAME FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC TDSD where (TDSD.DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME = '靠泊' OR TDSD.DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME = '移泊') AND TDSD.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId} and TDSD.BERTH_NAME is not null

SELECT sum(WEIGHT_GOODS) from T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH join (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID) CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港') ) VMI_INFO on VMI_INFO.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID where TBH.ID= #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT sum(WEIGHT_GOODS) from T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC ON TBH.TRUST_CARGO_ID = TBTC.ID join V_WEIGHT_INFO VMI_INFO on VMI_INFO.PLAN_NO = TBTC.BUSINESS_NO where TBH.ID= #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
